summary: A captioned video assembled from archival news clips with burned-in subtitles, addressing the H-1B visa program and American workers. Sampled frames include older television news footage labeled 'EXPORTING AMERICA' with a CNN logo and stock ticker, and a man in a suit speaking into a microphone at what appears to be a Senate hearing. The clip closes on a black screen showing the Department of Labor seal and a name caption.

script.scene: Archival CNN news footage with a lower-third reading 'EXPORTING AMERICA' and a caption 'UNTIL THE COMPANY'; a man walks across a suburban lawn.
A man in a dark suit speaks into a microphone at a hearing table, with the caption 'COMPLETELY'.
A black screen displays the U.S. Department of Labor seal above a name caption.

notable_text: EXPORTING AMERICA; CNN; DEPARTMENT OF LABOR UNITED STATES OF AMERICA
